titleStmt.title: SII 8.470: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 470. (A.R. No. 173 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭakopālade varkku yāṇṭu 4vatu nālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puliyūrkkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup peṟūrnāṭṭu maturaivāy
tirunalluḻāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ tiyākamekaṉeṉ tiruppāṟṟūrnāṭṭil Eṉṉuṭaiya civitam ciyarpuramāṉa tirunallūr Iṟaiyili tevatāṉaṅkaḷ nikki Ivvāṇṭaip puraṭṭāti mātamutal maṭappuṟamāka
Iṭṭu Itile vaṭakkilmaṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka pattuk kūṟiṭṭu Oru kūṟu nikki nikkiniṉṟa Oṉpatu kūṟum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Uṭaiyār tirukkāḷattiuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tiyākamekaṉcantikku Irutūmpu Ariciyai tiyākamekaṉmaṭattile nāḷoṉṟu
kku muppatu tecāntirikaḷukkuc coṟum Aiñcu pirāmaṇarkku Ariciyum Iṭavum Uṭalāka niccayittu Ippaṭiyāl cantirātittavarai sarvva māniyamākac celvatāka maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭeṉ tirunalluḻāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ tiyākamekaneṉ Ippaṭikku
Ivai tirunalluḻāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ tiyākamekaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīmāśvara ra kṣai
Digital edition of SII 8.470 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
